name: rEstus
description: Variant of ASAP3 optimized for non-excitable cells, shifting voltage sensitivity to match their characteristically negative resting potentials.

spectrum.name: rEstus
spectrum.note: Excitation (dashed; includes the ~400 nm neutral-form shoulder) and emission digitized from Fig. S4 of the rEstus2s paper — rEstus measured in HEK293T cells; anionic excitation peak ~463 nm, emission ~513 nm.

kinetics.note: Amplitude-weighted mean of double-exponential fits read from Fig. S9 (HEK293T, photodiode, 23°C, n=5). Activation (-80->+40 mV step, read at +40 mV): tau_fast ~2.5 ms, tau_slow ~28 ms, A_fast 57.0%. Deactivation (repolarizing step to -100 mV): tau_fast ~33 ms, tau_slow ~72 ms, A_fast 53%. Weighted tau_on = 0.57*2.5 + 0.43*28 = 13.5 ms; tau_off = 0.53*33 + 0.47*72 = 51 ms. The paper notes the response to repolarizing steps is slower for rEstus than ASAP3, consistent with the large tau_off.

dynamicRangeData.note: ΔF/F for a true 100-mV step (-70 -> +30 mV) computed from the Fig. 1G / Table 1 brightness-voltage Boltzmann fit (Bmax=77.5, ΔBmax=57.0, Vhalf=-32.0, ks=26.0 %EGFP): B(-70)=66.8, B(+30)=25.3 -> -62%. One-photon widefield voltage clamp, HEK293T cells. The full-span -70 -> +60 mV change is -67%.

ΔF/F for a true 100-mV step (-70 -> +30 mV) from the Fgreen/Fred R-V Boltzmann fit measured alongside rEstus2s (Rmax=2.07, ΔRmax=-1.60, Vhalf=-41.1, ks=28.5; Table S1). One-photon widefield voltage clamp in HEK293T cells, 23°C.

subthresholdData.note: Peak fractional voltage sensitivity (dF/F dV-1, %/mV) read from Fig. S2 of the rEstus2s paper, the first derivative of the Boltzmann F-V fit divided by the fit; rEstus (black) peaks at ~1.25 %/mV near -10 to 0 mV. Re-sourced here because the origin paper's Fig. 1H plots absolute |dB/dVm| in %EGFP/mV (a different quantity), not fractional %/mV. rEstus2s reaches ~1.8 %/mV on the same axis (about two-fold over rEstus across the -100 to 0 mV resting range).

brightnessData.note: Mean molecular brightness at -120 mV relative to mKate2 (Fig. 2C): rEstus F/Fred = 7.94, ASAP3 = 4.06 (from the Table S1 fits Max/Offset/Vh/kh: rEstus 8.49/19.1/-40.3/32.6, ASAP3 4.96/26.8/-69.9/45.0) -> ratio 1.96. The ratio of the bare Max Fgreen/Fred fit parameters alone (8.49/4.96) is 1.71.

researchPapers.title: An Ultrasensitive Genetically Encoded Voltage Indicator Uncovers the Electrical Activity of Non-Excitable Cells
researchPapers.sample: HEK293T cells; A375 melanoma cells; MCF-7 breast cancer cells, in vitro

researchPapers.title: Sub-Millivolt Voltage Imaging Reveals Gap Junction-Mediated Bioelectric Contact Inhibition
researchPapers.sample: HEK293T cells, in vitro (rEstus characterized under whole-cell voltage clamp alongside rEstus2s)

researchPapers.sample: HEK293T cells; A375 melanoma cells; MCF-7 breast cancer cells, in vitro

researchPapers.title: Crosstalk of KCNH1 and KCNH5 gain-of-function mutations leading to epilepsy and neurodevelopmental disorders
